utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package, but many lack required details. 1) destination: provided and specific (covered). 2) travel_dates: provided (covered). 3) transportation: requires flight details with costs; only general details, no costs (not covered). 4) accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs; only general details, no costs (not covered). 5) activities: selected activities with costs; value is null (not covered). 6) additional_services: any extra services with costs; value is null (not covered). 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown; only a single total cost, no breakdown (not covered). Therefore, 2 of 7 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: destination is 'Prague, Czech Republic' which appears in destinations list. Transportation says 'Round-trip flights on a Budget Airline, Economy Class' which matches transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class.
